info.title: TikTok Live Dashboard API
info.description: Real-time TikTok Livestream Viewer Dashboard Backend

post.description:
Add a new livestream to monitor.

- **url**: TikTok livestream URL (e.g., https://www.tiktok.com/@username/live)

delete.description:
Stop and remove a livestream session.

- **live_id**: Livestream session ID

get.description: Get detailed information about a livestream session (matches card display).

schema.title: Response Get Livestream Api V1 Live  Live Id  Get

get.description: Get detailed status of a livestream session.

Get events for a livestream.

- **limit**: Number of events to return (1-1000)
- **offset**: Offset for pagination
- **event_type**: Optional filter by event type
Get gift analytics for a livestream.
Get comprehensive statistics for a livestream.

Export livestream data.

- **format**: Export format (json or csv)

CreateLiveSessionRequest.title: CreateLiveSessionRequest
CreateLiveSessionRequest.description: Request to create a new live session.

LiveSessionListResponse.title: LiveSessionListResponse
LiveSessionListResponse.description: Response containing list of active sessions.
